name: WatchSync
overview: Sync watch history between libraries of different qualities (4K/HD)
description: Automatically synchronizes watch history between libraries of different qualities (4K/HD). When a movie is watched in 4K, the HD version is also marked as watched (and vice versa). Uses IMDB, TMDB and TVDB identifiers to match media between libraries.

versions.changelog: Initial release with automatic sync and scheduled task

name: JellyTag-Plus
overview: Overlays quality badges (resolution, HDR, codec, audio, language, collections) on media posters and thumbnails
description: JellyTag-Plus automatically overlays quality badges on your media posters and thumbnails. Supports per-library badge type controls, resolution, HDR, video codec, audio, alphabetized language flags with undetermined fallback, VOST indicator, and multiple regex-matched collection badges with custom images.

versions.changelog: Expand the JellyTag-Plus cache warmer to pre-render client-specific image size variants for Findroid, Jellyfin Web, Android/iOS/Desktop Qt web-shell clients, Android TV, Roku, and Streamyfin.
